name: faraday_induction_identity
statement: theorem faraday_induction_identity (Φ : ℝ) : -(-Φ) = Φ
description: Faraday's law — changing magnetic flux induces EMF

name: conservation_of_momentum
statement: theorem conservation_of_momentum (p1 p2 : ℝ) : p1 + p2 = p2 + p1
description: Conservation of momentum — total momentum is commutative

name: kinetic_energy_identity
statement: theorem kinetic_energy_identity (m v : ℝ) : 1/2 * m * v^2 = m * v^2 * 1/2
description: Kinetic energy = ½mv² — commutative in coefficient

name: stefan_boltzmann_identity
statement: theorem stefan_boltzmann_identity (σ T : ℝ) : σ * T^4 = T^4 * σ
description: Stefan-Boltzmann law — total radiance ∝ T⁴ (empirical, not yet explained)

name: time_dilation_identity
statement: theorem time_dilation_identity (Δt γ : ℝ) (h : γ ≠ 0) : Δt / γ * γ = Δt
description: Time dilation Δt' = Δt/γ — proper time is invariant

name: velocity_addition_relativistic
statement: theorem velocity_addition_relativistic (u v c : ℝ) : (u + v) / (1 + u*v/c^2) = (u + v) / (1 + u*v/c^2)
description: Relativistic velocity addition — replaces Galilean u+v

name: michelson_morley_null_result
statement: theorem michelson_morley_null_result (t_parallel t_perp : ℝ) (h : t_parallel = t_perp) : t_parallel - t_perp = 0
description: Michelson-Morley — no aether drift detected (null result unexplained)

name: newton_second_law_identity
statement: theorem newton_second_law_identity (F m a : ℝ) (h : F = m * a) : F = a * m
description: Newton's second law — F = ma, commutative in mass and acceleration

name: coulomb_force_symmetry
statement: theorem coulomb_force_symmetry (q1 q2 r : ℝ) : q1 * q2 / r^2 = q2 * q1 / r^2
description: Coulomb's law — force is symmetric in charge exchange

name: wien_displacement_identity
statement: theorem wien_displacement_identity (b T : ℝ) : b / T = b / T
description: Wien's displacement law — peak wavelength ∝ 1/T (empirical)

name: energy_conservation_algebraic
statement: theorem energy_conservation_algebraic (E₁ E₂ ΔE : ℝ) (h : E₂ = E₁ + ΔE) (hz : ΔE = 0) : E₂ = E₁
proof: rw [hz, add_zero] at h; exact h
description: Energy conservation: ΔE=0 implies E₁=E₂ (classical)

name: energy_nonconservation_algebraic
statement: theorem energy_nonconservation_algebraic (E₁ E₂ ΔE : ℝ) (h : E₂ = E₁ + ΔE) (hpos : ΔE > 0) : E₂ > E₁
description: Energy non-conservation: ΔE>0 at quantum scale (uncertainty — pre-1905 concept, formalized 1927)

name: velocity_addition_galilean
statement: theorem velocity_addition_galilean (u v w : ℝ) (h : w = u + v) : u = w - v
description: Galilean velocity addition: w=u+v implies u=w-v

name: velocity_bound_relativistic
statement: theorem velocity_bound_relativistic (v c : ℝ) (h : v < c) (hc : c > 0) : v / c < 1
description: Relativistic bound: v<c implies v/c<1 (requires c>0 hypothesis)

name: ideal_gas_pressure_ratio
statement: theorem ideal_gas_pressure_ratio (P V n R T : ℝ) (h : P * V = n * R * T) (hV : V ≠ 0) : P = n * R * T / V
description: Ideal gas law: PV=nRT solved for P via field_simp and hypothesis

name: blackbody_energy_density_bound
statement: theorem blackbody_energy_density_bound (u T : ℝ) (hu : 0 ≤ u) (hT : T > 0) : u / (T^4) ≥ 0
description: Blackbody energy density: u/T^4≥0 (finite at all T>0, pre-Planck)

name: photoelectric_threshold_condition
statement: theorem photoelectric_threshold_condition (E W : ℝ) (hE : E ≥ W) : E - W ≥ 0
description: Photoelectric threshold: electron emission iff photon energy ≥ work function

name: gravitational_superposition
statement: theorem gravitational_superposition (V₁ V₂ V : ℝ) (h : V = V₁ + V₂) : V - V₁ = V₂
description: Gravitational potential superposition: V=V₁+V₂ implies V-V₁=V₂

name: hyp_rewrite_eq
statement: theorem hyp_rewrite_eq (a b : ℝ) (h : a = b) : b = a
description: Hypothesis rewrite: given h: a=b, prove b=a

name: hyp_rewrite_add
statement: theorem hyp_rewrite_add (a b c : ℝ) (h : a = b) : a + c = b + c
description: Hypothesis rewrite: given h: a=b, prove a+c = b+c

name: hyp_rewrite_mul
statement: theorem hyp_rewrite_mul (a b c : ℝ) (h : a = b) : a * c = b * c
description: Hypothesis rewrite: given h: a=b, prove a*c = b*c

name: hyp_exact_eq
statement: theorem hyp_exact_eq (a b : ℝ) (h : a = b) : a = b
description: Hypothesis exact: given h: a=b, exact h proves a=b

name: hyp_exact_ineq
statement: theorem hyp_exact_ineq (a b : ℝ) (h : a ≤ b) : a ≤ b
description: Hypothesis exact: given h: a≤b, exact h proves a≤b

name: hyp_symm_eq
statement: theorem hyp_symm_eq (a b : ℝ) (h : a = b) : b = a
description: Symmetry: h: a=b gives h.symm: b=a

name: hyp_rewrite_then_exact
statement: theorem hyp_rewrite_then_exact (a b : ℝ) (h : a = b) : b = a
description: Rewrite then exact: rw [h] proves b=a (already rfl)

name: hyp_rewrite_at_left
statement: theorem hyp_rewrite_at_left (a b : ℝ) (h : a = b) : b + a = a + b
description: Rewrite at position: rw [h] changes all a to b, then rfl

name: transitivity_eq
statement: theorem transitivity_eq (a b c : ℝ) (h₁ : a = b) (h₂ : b = c) : a = c
description: Transitivity: a=b and b=c implies a=c via rw [h₁, h₂]

name: transitivity_ineq
statement: theorem transitivity_ineq (a b c : ℝ) (h₁ : a ≤ b) (h₂ : b ≤ c) : a ≤ c
description: Inequality transitivity: a≤b and b≤c gives a≤c via linarith

name: transitivity_lt
statement: theorem transitivity_lt (a b c : ℝ) (h₁ : a < b) (h₂ : b < c) : a < c
description: Strict inequality transitivity via linarith

name: hyp_rewrite_then_ring
statement: theorem hyp_rewrite_then_ring (a b : ℝ) (h : a = b) : (a + b)^2 = 4 * a * b + (a - b)^2
description: Rewrite hypothesis then ring: substitute b for a and expand

name: chirp_mass_identity
description: Chirp mass M_chirp — determines GW frequency evolution during inspiral

name: higgs_mechanism_identity
statement: theorem higgs_mechanism_identity (v μ : ℝ) : v^2 = v^2
description: Higgs mechanism — vacuum expectation value gives masses to W and Z bosons

name: gauge_invariance_identity
statement: theorem gauge_invariance_identity (ψ α : ℝ) : ψ * exp(i*α) * exp(-i*α) * ψ = ψ^2
description: U(1) gauge invariance — phase rotations leave physics unchanged

name: planck_scale_completion_identity
statement: theorem planck_scale_completion_identity (G ℏ c : ℝ) (hG : G > 0) (hℏ : ℏ > 0) (hc : c > 0) : √(ℏ*G/c^3) > 0
description: Planck length ℓ_P = √(ℏG/c³) is finite — GR+QM both needed at this scale

name: cosmological_constant_identity
statement: theorem cosmological_constant_identity (Λ gμν Tμν G c : ℝ) : Λ*gμν = Λ*gμν
description: Cosmological constant Λ — 10^120 discrepancy with QFT prediction

name: dark_matter_cross_section_limit
statement: theorem dark_matter_cross_section_limit (σ m_DM : ℝ) (hσ : σ > 0) (hm : m_DM > 0) : σ / m_DM > 0
description: Dark matter cross-section / mass — constrained by direct detection experiments

name: black_hole_information_paradox_identity
statement: theorem black_hole_information_paradox_identity (S_BH S_vN : ℝ) : S_BH - S_vN = S_BH - S_vN
description: Black hole information paradox — Bekenstein-Hawking entropy vs von Neumann entropy

name: born_probability_identity
statement: theorem born_probability_identity (ψ : ℝ) : ψ^2 ≥ 0
description: Born rule — probability = |ψ|² is non-negative

name: hawking_radiation_temperature
statement: theorem hawking_radiation_temperature (ℏ c G M k_B : ℝ) : ℏ*c^3/(8*π*G*M*k_B) = ℏ*c^3/(8*π*G*M*k_B)
description: Hawking temperature T_H = ℏc³/(8πGMk_B) — black holes radiate

name: sigma8_tension_identity
statement: theorem sigma8_tension_identity (σ8_Planck σ8_KiDS : ℝ) : σ8_Planck - σ8_KiDS = σ8_Planck - σ8_KiDS
description: S_8 tension — structure growth amplitude discrepancy

name: de_broglie_wavelength_identity
statement: theorem de_broglie_wavelength_identity (h p : ℝ) : h / p = h / p
description: de Broglie wavelength λ = h/p — wave-particle duality

name: compton_scattering_identity
statement: theorem compton_scattering_identity (lam lam' theta : ℝ) : lam' - lam = lam' - lam
description: Compton scattering Δλ = h/(m_ec)(1 - cos θ) — photon-electron interaction

name: bohr_radius_identity
statement: theorem bohr_radius_identity (ε0 h m_e e : ℝ) : 4*π*ε0*h^2/(m_e*e^2) = 4*π*ε0*h^2/(m_e*e^2)
description: Bohr radius a₀ — first quantum model of hydrogen atom

name: rydberg_formula_identity
statement: theorem rydberg_formula_identity (R_inf n1 n2 : ℝ) : R_inf*(1/n1^2 - 1/n2^2) = R_inf*(1/n1^2 - 1/n2^2)
description: Rydberg formula — spectral lines of hydrogen explained by quantization

name: pauli_exclusion_symmetry
statement: theorem pauli_exclusion_symmetry (ψ_anti : ℝ) : ψ_anti + ψ_anti = 2 * ψ_anti
description: Pauli exclusion — antisymmetric wavefunction for fermions

name: quark_confinement_identity
statement: theorem quark_confinement_identity (r : ℝ) : r * r = r^2
description: Quark confinement — QCD potential grows linearly with distance

name: higgs_vacuum_expectation_value
statement: theorem higgs_vacuum_expectation_value (v : ℝ) : v^2 ≥ 0
description: Higgs VEV v ≈ 246 GeV — electroweak symmetry breaking scale

name: neutral_current_identity
statement: theorem neutral_current_identity (g g' theta_W : ℝ) : g*cos theta_W = g*cos theta_W
description: Neutral current coupling — predicted by electroweak theory

name: cabibbo_angle_unitarity
statement: theorem cabibbo_angle_unitarity (θ_c : ℝ) : sin θ_c ^ 2 + cos θ_c ^ 2 = 1
description: Cabibbo angle — quark mixing and CKM matrix unitarity

name: gluon_eightfold_identity
statement: theorem gluon_eightfold_identity (n : ℝ) : n^2 - 1 = (n-1)*(n+1)
description: SU(3) gluons — 8 = 3² - 1 generators of color symmetry

name: cosmic_microwave_dipole_identity
statement: theorem cosmic_microwave_dipole_identity (ΔT T0 : ℝ) : ΔT / T0 = ΔT / T0
description: CMB dipole — our motion relative to the CMB rest frame

name: neutrino_mass_splitting
statement: theorem neutrino_mass_splitting (dm2_21 dm2_31 : ℝ) (h : dm2_21 < dm2_31) : dm2_21 ≤ dm2_31
description: Neutrino mass hierarchy — Δm²₂₁ ≪ Δm²₃₁ (solar vs atmospheric)

name: planck_spectrum_normalization
statement: theorem planck_spectrum_normalization (A_s n_s : ℝ) (h : n_s < 1) : n_s - 1 < 0
description: Primordial power spectrum P(k) ∝ k^{n_s-1} — n_s ≈ 0.965 (red tilt)

name: lensing_convergence_identity
statement: theorem lensing_convergence_identity (k g1 g2 : ℝ) : k^2 + g1^2 + g2^2 ≥ 0
description: Weak lensing — convergence κ and shear γ encode matter distribution

name: sz_effect_identity
statement: theorem sz_effect_identity (y T_CMB : ℝ) (hy : y > 0) (hT : T_CMB > 0) : y * T_CMB > 0
description: Sunyaev-Zeldovich effect — CMB photons Compton-scattered by cluster electrons

name: dark_photon_kinetic_mixing
statement: theorem dark_photon_kinetic_mixing (ε : ℝ) : ε^2 ≥ 0
description: Dark photon kinetic mixing parameter ε — portal to hidden sector

name: axion_coupling_identity
statement: theorem axion_coupling_identity (g_aγγ m_a : ℝ) : g_aγγ / m_a = g_aγγ / m_a
description: Axion-photon coupling g_{aγγ} — QCD axion as dark matter candidate

name: gravitational_memory_identity
statement: theorem gravitational_memory_identity (Δh_plus : ℝ) : Δh_plus = Δh_plus
description: Gravitational memory effect — permanent spacetime displacement after GW passage

name: string_theory_tadpole_identity
statement: theorem string_theory_tadpole_identity (N_D3 N_O3 : ℝ) : N_D3 - 4*N_O3 = N_D3 - 4*N_O3
description: Tadpole cancellation — D3-brane charge conservation in flux compactifications

name: ekpyrotic_bounce_identity
statement: theorem ekpyrotic_bounce_identity (H a : ℝ) (ha : a > 0) : H^2 * a^2 ≥ 0
description: Ekpyrotic/cyclic cosmology — contracting phase before Big Bang bounce
